body.raw:
{
  "passage": "Climate change refers to long-term shifts in global temperatures and weather patterns. While some climate change is natural, since the 19th century human activities have been the main driver.",
  "question": "What is the best summary of this passage?",
  "options": [
    "Climate change is entirely caused by humans",
    "Climate change involves long-term changes, mainly driven by humans since the 19th century",
    "Natural climate change stopped in the 19th century",
    "Weather patterns have always been stable"
  ],
  "correct_answer": "B",
  "explanation": "The passage states both natural and human causes but emphasises human activity since the 19th century.",
  "difficulty": "medium",
  "topic": "Environment",
  "is_active": true
}
